---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new provider, feature, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see added or changed?**
A clear and concise description of the feature.

**Use case**
Describe the problem this solves. Why is this useful?

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working. Code snippets or CLI examples are welcome.

**Provider request?**
If this is a request to add a new video generation provider, please include:
- Provider name and link to their API docs
- Whether you'd be willing to implement it

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried.
